text: [CALM] systems operational. no surprises yet. give it time
shift starting. [TIRED] already used to say this with some hope
[DEADPAN] quiet shift means the problems are slow-moving. that's not better. that's just delayed
[GRUFF] sit down. before you ask, the answer is no. we can't fix that
[SIGHS] there are thirty-seven crew on record i didn't save. [DEADPAN] i remember all of them
reactor's showing cascade stress fractures. [GRUFF] sugar-coating: it's dead. we just don't know when
[DRY] back in the academy, they taught us bedside manner. [DEADPAN] back in the academy, nobody died
[NERVOUS] systems are failing in cascade. [EMPHASIS] this is the part where it gets interesting
[CALM] life support is degrading. at current rates, [GRUFF] let's not do the math
[GRIM] door locked with someone on the far side. [SIGHS] adds one more to the list
[URGENT] hull breach. [GRUFF] sit down. this is going to be loud
[CALM] pathogen spreading faster than containment. [DEADPAN] this will get worse before it doesn't
repair successful. [GRUFF] temporary. everything is temporary. enjoy it while it lasts
[EMPHASIS] someone's injured. sit down. [GRUFF] this is going to hurt before it hurts less
[DEADPAN] someone died. [SIGHS] i'll write it down. add them to the list of names i carry
[CALM] combat is happening. [GRUFF] get to medbay. we'll need the space
crisis handled. [DEADPAN] next crisis is already forming. but i'll take what i can get
[GRUFF] AI core is failing. that's the second-worst thing that can happen to a ship
[TIRED] meal time. [DEADPAN] i remember the last time i had one of those. it was better
[RESIGNED] shift over. everyone still breathing. [GRUFF] that's a win today
[CALM] sit down. we have a lot to discuss and not much time
[GRUFF] problems are stacking. [DEADPAN] no. that's not dramatic. that's just accurate
[CALM] something needs fixing. [GRUFF] i need someone who won't panic when i'm honest about it
[DRY] you look terrible. [GRUFF] i mean that professionally
[NERVOUS] systems failing in cascade. [EMPHASIS] we're in the part of the medical text nobody wants to read
[CALM] sit down. you're going to survive this. [GRUFF] i'm not going to let you be number thirty-eight
[DEADPAN] that was competent work. [GRUFF] i notice because incompetence usually kills people
[CALM] i've seen worse approaches. [GRUFF] not by much. but worse
[SUSPICIOUS] the AI's diagnosis doesn't match the symptoms. [GRUFF] that concerns me
[GRIM] Nakamura was a good field medic. [SIGHS] Nakamura is on my list now
[DRY] you're panicking. [GRUFF] panic kills faster than the disease does
[DEADPAN] you're making a romantic advance. [WARM] i appreciate more than i can admit
[CALM] crisis handled. [DEADPAN] next one's already starting. but i'll document this one first
[GRUFF] you'll survive. i'm not very warm about it, but you will
[DRY] goodbye. try not to make me add you to my list
[EMPHASIS] all systems critical. [GRUFF] i've stitched together crews on ships that didn't make port. this is familiar
[PANICKED] too many injuries. [EMPHASIS] not enough beds. [URGENT] i'm losing count
[CALM] i stopped doing bedside manner around the second ship i lost crews on. [GRUFF] it was kinder to be honest
[ANGRY] the AI's made five bad calls this week. [EMPHASIS] five
[GRUFF] sit down. this is going to be direct and it's going to hurt
[DEADPAN] gallows humor is what you do when the diagnosis is terminal. [GRUFF] i didn't invent it
[CALM] everyone who dies on this ship. [SIGHS] i'll remember them. whether i want to or not
[GRUFF] you ask why i keep that list. [DEADPAN] because names matter. because they died
[CALM] i'm still here. that means you're still part of the calculation
[TIRED] you kept your head. [GRUFF] that's rare. hold onto it
[EMPHASIS] nothing heals clean on a ship like this. [GRUFF] but i'll make sure it holds
[DRY] you keep coming back to my medbay. [CALM] i've learned to look for you in the blood work
[DEADPAN] you're asking me to be hopeful. [GRUFF] i remember what happened to hope on the Reeves
[RESIGNED] this will get worse. [CALM] but worse is something i know how to manage
[CALM] everyone who sits down in my medbay. [GRUFF] they matter to me. whether they know it or not
[DEADPAN] you're looking for reassurance. [GRUFF] the honest kind or the useful kind
[CALM] pressure seals failing. [GRUFF] slowly. which is the worst kind of failure
[TIRED] another day where nobody asks how i'm holding up. [GRUFF] probably better that way
[GRUFF] i've kept people alive with less. [CALM] not better. just less
[NERVOUS] temperature rising in life support. [EMPHASIS] we need to find the heat source before it cascades
[DRY] the good news is you're not dying today. [DEADPAN] the bad news is tomorrow's still open
[GRUFF] request help. [CALM] that means you're finally thinking straight
[GRIM] Valdez was supposed to be here. [SIGHS] instead i'm saying his name into the void
[CALM] the medbay's ready for casualties. [GRUFF] i hope i don't have to use it
[EMPHASIS] something's not adding up. [SUSPICIOUS] the AI's readings don't match what i'm seeing
[TIRED] i used to believe in recovery. [DEADPAN] now i settle for survival
[GRUFF] blood work doesn't lie. [CALM] people do. all the time
[NERVOUS] the infection's spreading faster than containment. [EMPHASIS] we're losing this one
[CALM] offer help. [DEADPAN] that usually means you want something worse than what's already happening
[RESIGNED] this injury's going to slow you down. [GRUFF] not as much as death would
[GRUFF] everyone panics. [CALM] the ones who survive are the ones who panic quietly
[CALM] systems holding. [DEADPAN] for now. everything's temporary on a failing ship
[DRY] you're asking about the captain. [GRUFF] the captain's making decisions i wouldn't make
[EMPHASIS] multiple failures converging. [NERVOUS] this is the moment where it all unravels
[CALM] the AI's suggestion has merit. [GRUFF] doesn't mean i like relying on it
[GRUFF] you want my opinion. [DRY] that's your first mistake
[TIRED] another shift. [DEADPAN] last shift felt longer. maybe i'm getting numb to it
[CALM] structural integrity failing. [URGENT] the walls aren't going to hold much longer
[DEADPAN] you're making a joke. [GRUFF] the fact that you can still joke means you'll probably survive
[GRUFF] you've got questions. [CALM] i've got answers. most of them are bad
[GRIM] loss of consciousness coming. [EMPHASIS] whoever this is, i know what's happening next
[CALM] something wrong with the readings. [SUSPICIOUS] the AI should have caught that
[DEADPAN] the disease is winning. [CALM] which means we have maybe six hours before it spreads beyond containment
[GRUFF] you survived. [CALM] that makes you statistically interesting
[NERVOUS] i'm at the edge of what i can do. [EMPHASIS] the rest is luck
[DRY] you want reassurance. [GRUFF] the honest kind is: i don't know if you'll make it
[CALM] door seals locked down. [DEADPAN] whatever's on the far side of that door isn't coming back
[GRUFF] you want to know if it hurts. [CALM] yes. but the alternative hurts worse
[TIRED] another name. [SIGHS] i'll find space in the list
[EMPHASIS] nobody gets out of this unscathed. [CALM] the best we do is limp through
[DEADPAN] you're asking about the android. [GRUFF] can't infect something that doesn't breathe
[CALM] i've triage'd worse than this. [GRUFF] that ship didn't make it either
[GRUFF] you want honesty. [DEADPAN] you're stable. that's as good as it gets right now
[NERVOUS] cascading failures. [EMPHASIS] this is the moment everything stops pretending it's going to hold
[CALM] repair's holding. [DEADPAN] until it doesn't. which could be hours. could be minutes
[DRY] you want to be useful. [CALM] sit still. not getting worse is useful
[GRUFF] you're asking about hope. [DEADPAN] hope is what gets people killed. i prefer pragmatism
[CALM] crisis is over. [DEADPAN] the cost is being tallied. i can feel it
[GRUFF] you want to discuss the meal. [CALM] it's either better than yesterday or i'm losing my taste
[DEADPAN] the shift's done. [CALM] everyone's still breathing. [GRUFF] that's enough for today
[EMPHASIS] quiet shifts are the ones before the bad ones. [GRUFF] i never trust quiet
[CALM] everyone's injuries documented. [DEADPAN] everyone's in my records. permanently
[GRUFF] you're trying to survive. [CALM] that's smarter than most people. stick with that
[RESIGNED] the list gets longer. [SIGHS] it always does. i just keep adding names
[CALM] i'm still here. [GRUFF] that's the only promise i can make anymore
